examples: Young and old, rural and urban, Ibo, Hausa and Yoruba: each group sees the world differently.
For example, the women from Yoruba tribe in West Africa consume plenty of cassava, a type of yam or sweet potato.
Center of a powerful Yoruba kingdom until the late 17th century, it is an agricultural market with varied industries.
"Feast, " directed by Rufus Norris, is an exploration of Yoruba culture, written by five playwrights (Feb. 1-23).
